light_cap.name: The Golden Altar of Sanctum
light_cap.description: A massive, glowing altar of pure sunlight. The air here thrums with divine power.

shadow_cap.name: The Obsidian Throne of Noxus
shadow_cap.description: A dark, Jagged throne that seems to swallow all light. Shadows dance around its base.

instinct_cap.name: The Ironbark Root of Grog
instinct_cap.description: An ancient, petrified tree root that pulses with the heartbeat of the wilds.

border_north.name: The Sentinel Pillar
border_north.description: A tall stone pillar marking the northern border. It pulses with a steady light.

border_southeast.name: The Shadow Obelisk
border_southeast.description: A dark obelisk draped in tattered banners. It exudes a sense of dread.

border_southwest.name: The Wild Cairn
border_southwest.description: A simple pile of large stones covered in moss. Spirits seem to whisper nearby.

steven_4_3.name: Shrine of Steven
steven_4_3.description: A sacred place dedicated to Steven.
